name: @rex_koh/subagent-budget-guard
description: Claude Code plugin that blocks subagents by default, records verified subagent usage, and enforces 5-hour usage budgets.
author: ClaudeSubAgentSuppressor

scripts.prepack: node --check bin/hook.js && node --check bin/statusline.js && node --check bin/setup.js && node --check bin/report.js && node --check bin/view.js && node --check bin/verify.js && node --check bin/subagent-cap.js && node --check lib/guard.js && node --check lib/verifier.js
